svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 244, 255), rgb(23, 28, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 58, 92), rgb(167, 195, 224));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 170px; height: 1px; padding-top: 235px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #10202E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#10202E, #c9d6e2); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
